# 27 Pictures

> Professional horror film production studio specializing in psychological horror short films, AI-enhanced cosplay cinematography, and neural synthesis visual effects.

27 Pictures is a film production studio founded in 2025. We create psychological horror short films under the "The Red Smile" series and offer professional AI-enhanced cosplay cinematography services.

## What is Neural Synthesis?

Neural Synthesis is our production pipeline that combines AI-generated environment mapping and texture diffusion with live-action 4K RAW footage. It is not a filter or a post-processing effect — it is a full production methodology that allows us to build impossible environments and hyper-realistic visual textures around live talent during compositing.

## Services

- **Horror Film Production**: Psychological horror short films. Atmosphere-driven storytelling using deep-shadow cinematography, discordant soundscapes, and neural synthesis VFX. Prioritizes dread over jump-scares.
- **Cosplay Cinematography**: Full-production cosplay sessions with professional lighting, direction, and post-production. 4K RAW capture, cinematic colour grading, and character-specific compositing. Book via info@twentyseven.pictures.
- **Beyond the Mask (AI Production)**: AI-enhanced cosplay and horror production using Neural Synthesis — generative environment mapping and texture diffusion layered over live 4K footage.
- **VFX Assembly**: Full-pipeline digital compositing integrating live-action with supernatural and AI-generated effects.
- **Sonic Landscapes**: Bespoke music scoring and foley design. Custom scores for every production.
- **Post-Processing**: Meticulous colour grading and 4K assembly with a director's eye for lighting and narrative weight.

## The Red Smile Series

"The Red Smile" is a psychological horror short film series on YouTube. Each episode explores the distortion of the human psyche through cinematic imagery. A recurring visual motif — subtle red smiles hidden within each frame — invites viewers to search every release.

Episodes:
- The Follower — She Thought It Was Just a Normal Run
- She Asked for Argyle Alley… But Was This the Right One?
- My Reflection Started Glitching…
- The Streamer — Watch Till the End

Watch at: https://www.youtube.com/@twentyseven.pictures
